Remodeling Services in Belgrade, MT

Call 406-551-5061 Get a Free Estimate

Serving Belgrade Homeowners

Belgrade has grown fast. What was a small town west of Bozeman is now one of the Gallatin Valley's most active residential areas, with new subdivisions going in alongside established neighborhoods that have been here for decades.

I'm based in Bozeman and work in Belgrade regularly. It's a short drive, and I know the area — the newer developments along Jackrabbit Lane, the established neighborhoods closer to downtown, and the properties along the edges where homes sit on larger lots with views of the Bridger Range.

What I Do in Belgrade

Bathroom remodeling. Many Belgrade homes are newer construction with builder-grade finishes — basic tile, stock vanities, and fixtures that were chosen for cost, not quality. A bathroom remodel upgrades those spaces into something that actually fits how you use the room. Every project includes 3D design previews. More about bathroom remodeling.

Basement finishing. Belgrade's newer homes often have unfinished basements — clean, dry spaces with good ceiling height that are perfect for finishing into bedrooms, offices, or family rooms. That's square footage you already own but aren't using. More about basement remodeling.

Custom decks. With the mountain views Belgrade offers, a well-built deck is one of the best investments you can make. I build for Montana's climate — proper footings, galvanized hardware, and materials that handle the freeze-thaw. More about remodeling services.

Belgrade-Specific Considerations

Permits. Belgrade is within Gallatin County jurisdiction for most residential permits. Requirements vary by project scope — I handle the permitting and inspections.

Newer homes, specific opportunities. Many Belgrade homes are 5-15 years old, which means the structure is solid but the finishes are ready for an upgrade. Builder-grade bathrooms with basic tile and standard fixtures are prime candidates for a refresh that transforms the space without a full gut remodel.

Unfinished basements. If your Belgrade home has an unfinished basement with 8-foot ceilings and a clean slab, you're sitting on one of the most cost-effective ways to add living space. No foundation work, no roof — just framing, systems, and finishes.

The Same Process, Wherever You Are

Every Belgrade project gets the full Heartwood Craft treatment:

  • Itemized estimates with every line item visible
  • 3D design previews before construction
  • Daily photo updates during the build
  • Milestone payments tied to real progress
  • Change orders priced and approved before any scope changes

Ready to Talk?

Call 406-551-5061 or fill out the form below. I'll call back within an hour.
